trigger.description: The memory was persisted, but tag/link suggestion lookup failed.
setup_commands: ee remember 'J6 link suggestion seed.' --level semantic --kind fact --tags j6-link-suggestion --no-auto-link --no-propose-candidates --workspace . --json
trigger.invocation: ee remember 'J6 link suggestion trigger.' --level semantic --kind fact --tags j6-link-suggestion --no-auto-link --no-propose-candidates --workspace . --json

expected_emission.repair_string: Run `ee doctor --json` and inspect memory tag/link indexes.
